entities.name: 5-Phase Framework
entities.context: Battle-tested process with 100% success rate for importing workflows

entities.name: Phase 1: Analysis & Deconstruction
entities.context: First phase involving reading function, identifying purpose and dependencies

entities.name: Phase 2: Design & Architecture

entities.name: Phase 3: Implementation
entities.context: Third phase involving localization, command file creation, and documentation updates
